summary: Iteration 66 - Wealth Command v7.2.0 Phase 2 & Phase 3 Features Testing Complete. All 23 backend tests passed (100%). Verified Workflow Engine (4 templates, quick-start, dashboard, stats), Book Intelligence (12 clients, 30.8M AUM, AI insights, sector/tax/engagement analytics), and Alpaca paper trading integration (SDK installed, demo endpoints working).

issues: Compliance modal appears on every page load and blocks interaction - may want to persist 'Don't show again' checkbox state

critical_code_review_comments: All v7.2.0 Phase 2 & Phase 3 features working correctly
Workflow Engine: 4 templates (Onboarding-10 steps, Annual Review-8 steps, Tax Planning-5 steps, Portfolio Rebalancing-6 steps)
Book Intelligence: 12 demo clients with $30.8M AUM, AI-generated insights, sector concentration analysis, tax-loss harvesting opportunities
Alpaca SDK installed and working - demo endpoints return correct mock data, live trading requires API key configuration
Frontend pages /workflows and /book-intelligence load correctly with data
Navigation: Workflows under 'Clients' section, Book Intelligence under 'AI Tools' section
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - all APIs use in-memory demo data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 66 verified all v7.2.0 Phase 2 & 3 features: Workflow Engine with 4 templates and quick-start API, Book Intelligence with 12 demo clients and AI insights, Alpaca trading with SDK installed but not configured. All data is MOCKED/DEMO stored in memory.

mocked_apis.Workflow_Engine: MOCKED - In-memory storage fallback for workflow instances
mocked_apis.Book_Intelligence: MOCKED - 12 simulated clients with AUM, sector exposure, engagement scores
mocked_apis.Alpaca_Trading: MOCKED - Demo endpoints return simulated account/positions when API keys not configured

features_verified.workflow_templates: WORKING - GET /api/workflow/templates returns 4 templates with correct steps
features_verified.workflow_template_detail: WORKING - GET /api/workflow/templates/{id} returns full template with steps
features_verified.workflow_dashboard: WORKING - GET /api/workflow/dashboard returns summary with action items
features_verified.workflow_stats: WORKING - GET /api/workflow/stats returns totals and performance metrics
features_verified.workflow_create: WORKING - POST /api/workflow/create allows custom workflow creation
features_verified.book_sector: WORKING - GET /api/book-intelligence/sector-analysis returns allocation and concentration risks
features_verified.book_risk: WORKING - GET /api/book-intelligence/risk-analysis returns risk profile distribution
features_verified.alpaca_status: WORKING - GET /api/alpaca/status returns SDK installed, not configured
features_verified.alpaca_demo_account: WORKING - GET /api/alpaca/demo/account returns mock account data
features_verified.alpaca_demo_positions: WORKING - GET /api/alpaca/demo/positions returns 3 mock positions (AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL)
features_verified.frontend_workflows: WORKING - /workflows page loads with dashboard, templates, active workflows
features_verified.frontend_book_intel: WORKING - /book-intelligence page loads with insights, sector analysis, tabs
